en: Down the line, trumpets, bar seven and eight, three, four.
ja: トランペット、7小節と8小節。3、4。

en: Three, four. Okay, all right. Trombone bar 24, the and of two.
ja: トロンボーン、24小節、2の裏。

en: Maybe not. Tenor, let's start the pickup to 11. Three, four.
ja: テナー、11番への導入から始めよう。3、4。
zhTW: 男高音，從進入第11小節開始。3、4。
vi: Tenor, bắt đầu từ nhịp dàn vào 11. 3, 4.

en: Same spot. Three, four. Okay, all right. Well, you're in the first chair. Let's see if it's
because you're cute. Three, four. Yep, that's fine. Drums, let's hear a little double time swing.
ja: ドラム、ダブルタイムスウィングを少し聞かせて。
zhTW: 鼓手，讓我聽一段雙倍速搖擺。
vi: Trống, cho nghe một chút double time swing.

en: Behind. Same thing. Bass, five bars of Donna Lee.
ko: Behind. Same thing. Bass, five bars of Donna Lee.
ja: ベース、ドナ・リー5小節。
